title: cystopteris fragilis var. angustata
intro: Cystopteris fragilis var. angustata, also known as the narrow-leaved bladder fern, is a variety of the bladder fern plant that belongs to the Osmundaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The narrow-leaved bladder fern has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to soothe and calm irritated tissues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment.
